project_type: Python ML trading bridge + MQL5 EA for XAUUSD M1 scalping
build_system: pytest for tests, no formal build step for Python
test_framework: pytest with tests in python_bridge/tests/, fixtures in test files directly
verification_instructions: Run pytest on python_bridge/tests/ and confirm all tests pass. Note: test_momentum_buy_when_prices_rising has a pre-existing failure due to $1.50 threshold (will need to fix test data to exceed that threshold).
setup_instructions: Python 3.9 with packages: numpy, pandas, yfinance, ta, pytest already installed
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - yfinance downloads work. Python 3.9.25 available via python3 command.
contribution_requirements: RULES: input keyword is RESERVED in MQL5 - don't break it. Candle patterns only LOG never BLOCK. System is 100% self-tuning. Copy checkpoints/ folder when updating versions.
key_patterns: Signal generator uses momentum for DIRECTION and AI ensemble for TIMING. main.py run_cycle() fetches data, computes features, calls generate_signal(). Bridge writes CSV for MT5. v5.2 has retry logic in bridge.py write_signal() and write_ok check in main.py. ATR is capped at $5 in signal_generator.py line 1295.
directory_structure: python_bridge/ contains main.py (entry point), config/ (settings), data/ (market_data, sentiment, news), models/ (ensemble, lstm, transformer, rl), strategies/ (signal_generator, risk_manager, regime_detector, smart_exits, auto_optimizer), signals/ (bridge), tests/, dashboard/
